g.text: User would like to register new passkey
User enters passkey registration flow from SIWA/SIWF
Load in iFrame in background (iframe hidden)
Create SR25519 Keyring from mnemonic/seed phrase (iframe hidden)
IFrame now shown to user with seed phrase
User prompted to make sure they viewed seed phrase
User closes iframe (iframe now hidden again)
User clicks next and views "create passkey" page
User clicks button to create passkey
Client sends post message to iframe to start passkey creation flow
Iframe sends post message back to client with Account Public Key created from seed phrase (SR/Eth Public Key)
Client takes public key and creates optionsJSON object for the webauthn publicCredentialsCreate call
Retrieve Public Key Object from Attestation Object
Client post message to iframe to pass Passkey PublicKey Object to have signed by Account (SR/ETH) Private Key
Send Account signing COMPRESSED passkey public key signature back to client via post message from iframe
Encode ClientDataJSON and Attestation Object in Base64Url
POST acceptRegistration(passkeyData) (this endpoint validates passkey and saves to the db)
Parse Registration Request (webAuthnManager.parse(registrationRequest)) and set as Registration Data if
Set ServerProperty object parameters to match client side
Set PubKeyCredParams to match what is set on client side
UserPresenceRequired (this can be set to true))
Validate Registration Data and Registration Parameters (throw Validation Exception on failure)
If validated, create CredentialRecord Object (needed for webauthn)
(Optional) Retrieve Passkey Signature of Account Public Key from AttestationObject
Account signature of COMPRESSED Passkey public key,
(Optional: Passkey signature of account public key),
credentialDeviceType (authenticator attachment: platform = single device, cross-platform = multi-device),
credentialBackedUp (How do we verify this? Is it just cross-platform = true and platform = false?)
Let User know Registration has been completed
